title: Yamato Stands Against Kaido
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16, Luffy, Nami as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After dressing a duck or seabird, thoroughly heat its skin...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...to render the fat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That fat can be used as all- important cooking oil!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For the pot, I used the shell of a giant clam.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and set the shell on fire- heated rocks to cook it all as a stew.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I started by catching a nice, oily whitefish.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After filtering it, I set it in the sun to dry for a few hours.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Less Water means more flavor! Drying also boosts its vitamin D content.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I tossed that, some goose barnacles, and some limpets in the clam pot with some seawater...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The flavor 'keystone was the Siberian onions.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THEY'RE AN AROMATIC, FLAVORFUL WILD PLANT SIMILAR TO GARLIC

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Easy to work with too. There's no need to skim.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MMM! The two types of shellfish make for a hearty seafood broth...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: .....and the addictive aroma of garlic perfectly complements the hot, flaky fish!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Now how about the Tagliata?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Ahmm

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MMM! The tender meat contrasts wonderfully with the crispy, caramelized skin! What a perfect dish!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It wouldn't look amiss on the table of any haute cuisine restaurant!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: but ...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Delicious as they are...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: GLEAM

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... These dishes have one fatal flaw! They're missing that critical nutrient for high activity- carbohydrates!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Without carbohydrates, your energy will dry up in the blink of an eye!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: n'ray. I'll let you try these right out of the pot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Wild Yams!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A type of mountain yam, they're powerfully flavored and extremely sticky.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're chock-full of not only carbs, but also dietary fiber and minerals.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Grated some down into a paste...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and seasoned it with wild nori I found on some beach rocks.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mold it into balls and drop them into duck fat to fry...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and you get my momoiro wild yam joke Zeppoline!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 23.2.0.1.3 The standard version is made of a wheat and yeast dough. It's a fragrant, filling dish that smells of seaweed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Kunch

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So chewy! The crunchy exterior and fluffy, savory interior are too much to take!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the mild saltiness of the wild nori takes my appetite to new heights!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As a sidenote, did you know both wild yams and duck are packed with B vitamins?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That plus the allicin (Allyl sulfide) in the Siberian onions help to relieve fatigue!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those two nutrients combined make for the most effective survival dishes!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He used his skill and knowledge to bring out exactly what he wanted from his ingredients, all while minimize any bitterness or unwanted flavor.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: NOT BAD, DAHLING! Especially when you had next to nothing to work with!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: NAMI... Robin...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: for the two of you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I promise to keep offering nothing but the most delicious dishes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: even if we're lost...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: ...in the middle of an unexplored wilderness!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Buying

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 46 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
